input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.4.4
            TITLE: the upper side impact member must:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.4.4: The Upper Side Impact Member must:
F.6.4.4 The Upper Side Impact Member must: 
a. Connect the Main Hoop and the Front Hoop.  
b. Be entirely in a zone that is parallel to the ground between 240 mm and 320 mm above 
the lowest point of the top surface of the Lower Side Impact Member

final_answer: F.6.4.4 The Upper Side Impact Member must: a. Connect the Main Hoop and the Front Hoop. b. Be entirely in a zone that is parallel to the ground between 240 mm and 320 mm above the lowest point of the top surface of the Lower Side Impact Member
